description:
🕒 07:30–20:00

Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

Hanno Ecotourism Association: https://hanno-tourism.jp/hanno-eco/tour/ec-logcamp-bonomine-earlysummer/

RECRUITMENT CANCELLED due to organizer circumstances.

This tour was designed to reach the summit of Bonomine while learning the basics of stream walking on the beautiful Shirotani stream route with gorge terrain, and enjoying the streams. Lunch and dinner feature a bento box and dinner prepared by a game meat restaurant, where you can also learn about game meat cuisine.

【Fee】23,000 yen per person (includes guide fee, lunch and dinner, insurance)

【Capacity】5 people

【Guide】Tsuyoshi Shinohara, Japan Mountain Guides Association member, climbing guide stage III

【What to bring】20 ℓ backpack (with waterproof protection fully in place), complete stream equipment, change of clothes, helmet, harness, mountaineering gear, bus fare, bath fee, train fare
location: 集合 西武池袋線「飯能駅」改札口
summary: ℹ️ Recruitment cancelled: Stream walking at Bonomine and Gorge, enjoying Naguri River Shirotani source stream hike and game meat dinner
